info.name: RegiBase
info.summary: Personal database — templates, sharing, encryption, Tables integration and multiple views
info.description:
RegiBase is a lightweight personal database for the information you want to keep — credit cards, bank accounts, online accounts, memberships, licenses, contacts and anything else.
Design your own fields (or start from a template), then browse records as a list, detailed list, spreadsheet-style table (with a frozen first column), cards, or an image gallery.
Features: - Custom form fields with per-field input rules, built from reusable templates - Save your own templates, and edit the built-in ones (per-user override, resettable to default) - Duplicate a collection — optionally including all of its records - Share a collection with other Nextcloud users at three levels (view / edit / delete), with an optional access password and optional secret-field sharing - Optional client-side encryption (AES-GCM) for secret fields — the server never sees the key or the plaintext - Nextcloud Tables integration: import a table into a new collection, or export a collection to a new Tables table - Import from CSV / JSON (e.g. Google Password Manager), or from your Nextcloud Contacts (including photos) - Attach images and files from Nextcloud Files or Notes - Move / copy / merge records between collections - Password-protected full backup & restore (AES-256 ZIP) - Available in 12 languages
info.author: ktec-jp
